reasoning: FIDE updates its rankings monthly on the 1st of the month. The resolution on 2025-11-16 will still correspond to the Nov 1 list, where Anna Muzychuk is ranked 8th, making it highly probable there is no change. For December and February, live ratings can change due to tournaments. She currently holds an Elo of 2518, which is only 1 point ahead of Kateryna Lagno (#9 at 2517) and 5 points ahead of Bibisara Assaubayeva (#10 at 2513). With such narrow margins, any active tournament results in November, December, or January could easily shift rankings. The base rate for holding onto a position with such a narrow gap over the course of 1-3 months approaches a coin flip as uncertainty grows, so the probability trends toward 0.5 for the later dates.
